# Installation
> `npm install --save @types/react-native-md5`

# Summary
This package contains type definitions for react-native-md5 (https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-native-md5).

# Details
Files were exported from https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped/tree/master/types/react-native-md5.
## [index.d.ts](https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped/tree/master/types/react-native-md5/index.d.ts)
````ts
export function hex_md5(s: string): string;
export function b64_md5(s: string): string;
export function str_md5(s: string): string;
export function hex_hmac_md5(key: string, data: string): string;
export function b64_hmac_md5(key: string, data: string): string;
export function str_hmac_md5(key: string, data: string): string;
````
